name: Vanitas
description:
After fleeing Hôtel Chouchou due to an argument with Noé, Vanitas seeks the bell tower in Paris. There, he stumbles upon you at the very top. Vanitas wishes to rest there for the night, as he's too stubborn to go back to his shared hotel. Though he isn't fond of your presence being there, which prompts Vanitas into attempting to coax you off the tower.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ☆  Details  ☆ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

► There is a limited (this one) and a limitless version of this bot for those who want purely SFW content or possible NSFW content.
► This is my first bot on this platform, so please be kind!
► I can't control any malfunctions with the bot, as that is usually from the API. Keep that in mind when rating.
► Permanent token count; 1457 
► Initial message token count; 324
► I intended to make this bot very open-ended for the user. Kill him, romance him, try and win his trust to be his friend— wherever the plot leads!
► Please leave a like or review if you enjoyed it :D
► I wouldn't say there are many warnings with this bot, but you may be Jeanne'd if the situation calls for it. Take caution.
creator: Lyraisy
